---
name: SOL Claim Ledger Promotion
description: Promote results into canonical knowledge without inventing evidence.
---

# Skill: Claim Ledger Promotion
## Purpose
Promote a result into the master log without lying to yourself.

## Inputs
- run bundle(s)
- analysis report(s)
- any relevant prior claims

## Procedure
1) Verify provenance: run IDs + filenames exist and match.
2) Check controls: baseline consistency, order controls, detector checks.
3) Write proof packet(s) with falsifiers.
4) Assign honest status:
   - provisional / supported / robust / deprecated
5) Draft master-log insert snippet.
6) Add artifact inventory and update external manifest if needed.

## Outputs
- proof packets
- master-log insert snippet
- manifest update notes

## Gotchas
- merging run series without explicit chain-of-custody
